fixes.summary: TLS pipeline now emits generated_at on the priority artifact.
fixes.evidence: rank_systems() returns 'generated_at' produced by _generated_at_iso() (UTC ISO-8601, override-able via TLS_GENERATED_AT_OVERRIDE for tests).

fixes.summary: Dashboard freshness threshold reduced from 14d to 24h and made env-configurable.
Loader no longer falls back to file mtime when generated_at is missing or unparseable.
fixes.evidence: attemptLoad now leaves generated_at undefined when not a string; finalizeLoad returns invalid_timestamp instead of inventing a value.

fixes.summary: Loader rejects future-skewed timestamps beyond a 5-minute clock-skew tolerance.
fixes.evidence: FUTURE_SKEW_TOLERANCE_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000; finalizeLoad returns future_timestamp when ageMs < -tolerance.

fixes.summary: Top 3 surface no longer renders cards on stale, invalid_timestamp, future_timestamp, missing, invalid_schema; warning + recompute command surface instead.
fixes.evidence: extractTopThreeRecommendations early-returns empty cards with warning text 'Top 3 stale — regenerate priority artifact.' and the exact command.

fixes.summary: PRIORITY_RECOMPUTE_COMMAND now uses registry-active candidates only.
fixes.evidence: Candidates HOP,RAX,RSM,CAP,SEC,EVL,OBS,SLO replace the previous H01,RFX,MET,METS list.

tests_added: returns invalid_timestamp when generated_at is missing
returns invalid_timestamp when generated_at is unparseable
returns future_timestamp when generated_at is meaningfully in the future
tolerates small clock-skew (<5 minutes) without flagging future_timestamp
default 24h threshold flags 30h-old artifacts as stale
does NOT fall back to file mtime when generated_at is absent
